description: Search scope boundaries for search-and-verify agents (e.g. Codex). Bounds WHERE to search, not WHEN to stop.

cli/src/main.rs.check: Clap derive structs define all CLI commands and flags; AgentType enum lists supported agents (codex/gemini/claude/cursor/hermes)

cli/src/agents.rs.check: Redaction patterns; native cursor read/list/search + get_cursor_session_cwd; hermes_* read path; legacy gemini .pb / cursor .vscdb diagnostics

cli/src/cursor_cwd.rs.check: Cursor per-session cwd recovery: .workspace-trusted workspacePath, else filesystem-validated demangle

cli/src/checkpoint.rs.check: Checkpoint broadcast entry point; compose_state_message defines git-state message format

scripts/read_session.cjs.check: commandNames Set lists every chorus subcommand the Node CLI dispatches

scripts/conformance.sh.check: expect_success / run_*_case calls list all parity-tested commands

cli/src/main.rs.check: AgentType enum lists all supported agent names; Subcommand derive lists all CLI commands

cli/src/adapters/mod.rs.check: Adapter registry maps agent name to adapter (cursor + hermes wired here); mirror scripts/adapters/registry.cjs

impact_analysis.derived_file_policy: Do not list fixtures/golden/*.json individually as change targets. They are regenerated by running conformance tests.

cli/src/agent_context.rs.check: Template content functions, init flow, and seal flow with manifest schema-version enforcement

cli/src/agents.rs.check: Per-agent JSONL parsing and redaction; native cursor + hermes read paths

cli/src/cursor_parse.rs.check: Cursor transcript flatten (keeps text segments; tool_use rendered only under --tool-calls)

scripts/adapters/utils.cjs.check: Node-side redaction patterns plus findLatestByCwd / cwdMatchesProject shared helpers
